title: geranium robertianum f. modestum
intro: Geranium robertianum f. modestum, also known as the small-flowered crane's-bill or modest geranium, is a flowering plant species within the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Geranium robertianum f. modestum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
